architecture.summary: Keep queue-processor, submission-scanner is main path. CF Queue behind feature flag SKIP_QUEUE_ENQUEUE.

concurrency.summary: max_concurrency=10, BATCH_CONCURRENCY=3, max_batch_size=5. Age filter reduced to 30s.

tokenManagement.summary: TokenRotator already works in crawlers. Add GITHUB_TOKENS support to CF Worker consumer.ts.

staleness.summary: Per-state dedup: PUBLISHED=24h, REJECTED=48h, DEFAULT=72h. Rejected should be re-scannable. BLOCKED stays permanent.

featureFlags.summary: SKIP_QUEUE_ENQUEUE default true. Fallback to CF Queue if VMs down.
